name: chain_i_built_an_ai_system_that_creates_thousa
method:
I built an AI system that creates thousands of UGC videos per month — for a single brand.

No creators. 
No briefs. 
No $500 per video. 
Just output.

Here’s the full pipeline:

→ AI generates a reali

stages.task: scrape brands posting UGC job listings on Upwork/Fiverr/Twitter — these are buyers
score brands by budget signals (follower count, ad spend indicators, product price point)
generate 3 sample AI UGC videos per qualified brand using their product imagery
cold outreach with sample video attached — DM or email
